title: Swipe left, previous screen
scenario: Quick Start Guide screens navigate in reverse order when swiping left from the left edge of the screen
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app
Navigate to the Quick Start Guide (QSG) screens (e.g., via Home → Quick Start Guide or Account → Quick Start Guide)
Swipe forward to reach screen 4 (e.g., showing the charging case)
From screen 4, place your finger on the left edge of the screen and swipe left
expected: Swiping left from the left edge navigates backward through the guide screens in reverse order (e.g., from screen 4 → screen 3 (charging case) → screen 2 (two earbuds) → screen 1 (one earbud)).
